title: stanhopea shuttleworthii
intro: Stanhopea shuttleworthii, also known as the shuttleworth's stanhopea, is a species of orchid native to tropical Central and South America. The medicinal properties of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stanhopea shuttleworthii are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may also help to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
